en.title: Alois Irlmaier Prophecies - 15 Predictions from the Bavarian Seer (1894-1959) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Bavarian seer Alois Irlmaier (1894-1959) left striking prophecies about a future Russian invasion of Europe, Three Days of Darkness, a great comet, and more. Includes verified WWII-era predictions about locating missing persons and air raids.
